title: Academic Programs at RGMCET
content: RGMCET offers undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and certification programs across engineering, science, and management disciplines.
text_for_embedding: Academic Programs at RGMCET | Category: academics | Subcategory: programs | Keywords: RGMCET courses, RGMCET programs, UG PG PhD courses, engineering courses RGMCET, RGMCET academics | RGMCET offers undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and certification programs across engineering, science, and management disciplines.

title: Undergraduate Engineering Programs at RGMCET
content: RGMCET offers B.Tech programs in Civil Engineering (intake 120), Electrical and Electronics Engineering (120), Mechanical Engineering (120), Electronics and Communication Engineering (240), Computer Science and Engineering (420), CSE Data Science (240), CSE Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (240), and CSE Cyber Security (120).
text_for_embedding: Undergraduate Engineering Programs at RGMCET | Category: academics | Subcategory: programs | Keywords: RGMCET BTech courses, CSE intake RGMCET, EEE Mechanical Civil courses, engineering branches RGMCET, UG engineering RGMCET | RGMCET offers B.Tech programs in Civil Engineering (intake 120), Electrical and Electronics Engineering (120), Mechanical Engineering (120), Electronics and Communication Engineering (240), Computer Science and Engineering (420), CSE Data Science (240), CSE Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning (240), and CSE Cyber Security (120).

title: Postgraduate Programs at RGMCET
content: RGMCET offers postgraduate programs including Computer Aided and Structural Engineering (18), Electrical Drives and Control (18), Energy Engineering (9), VLSI Design (18), Computer Science (9), MBA (60), and MCA (60).
text_for_embedding: Postgraduate Programs at RGMCET | Category: academics | Subcategory: programs | Keywords: RGMCET MTech courses, MBA MCA RGMCET, PG programs RGMCET, VLSI Energy Engineering, postgraduate courses RGMCET | RGMCET offers postgraduate programs including Computer Aided and Structural Engineering (18), Electrical Drives and Control (18), Energy Engineering (9), VLSI Design (18), Computer Science (9), MBA (60), and MCA (60).

title: Doctoral Programs at RGMCET
content: RGMCET offers PhD programs in Civil Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, and MBA.
text_for_embedding: Doctoral Programs at RGMCET | Category: academics | Subcategory: programs | Keywords: RGMCET PhD, doctoral programs RGMCET, research programs, PhD engineering RGMCET, PhD admission RGMCET | RGMCET offers PhD programs in Civil Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Physics, Mathematics, and MBA.

title: Certification Courses at RGMCET
content: RGMCET offers certification programs under the Deen Dayal Upadhyay Kaushal Kendra including Computer Hardware, Linux Programming, and Data Entry Operator courses.
